name: StickmanQuiz
short_description: "StickmanQuiz" is a game where players control a stick figure to tackle two-choice quizzes. With three modes and nine challenges, players can test their knowledge across various quizzes. They can also compete against 100 NPC rivals. Aim to clear all challenges!
detailed_description: "StickmanQuiz" is a game where players control a stick figure to tackle two-choice quizzes. With three modes and nine challenges, players can test their knowledge across various quizzes. They can also compete against 100 NPC rivals. Aim to clear all challenges!
about_the_game: "StickmanQuiz" is a game where players control a stick figure to tackle two-choice quizzes. With three modes and nine challenges, players can test their knowledge across various quizzes. They can also compete against 100 NPC rivals. Aim to clear all challenges!
supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
